Retirement of Mr. Prashant Patil Mr. Prashant Patil will be retiring from his position as President   Manufacturing effective close of business on July 31, 2025, in line with the Company s age-based retirement policy. During his tenure, Mr. Patil has played a pivotal role in driving operational excellence and contributing significantly to the growth and success of our organisation. We extend our heartfelt gratitude for his invaluable contributions and dedicated service, and we wish him the very best in his future endeavours.b. Appointment of Mr. Rajesh Naik Mr. Rajesh Naik has been appointed as President - Manufacturing, in the category of Senior Management Personnel of the Company w.e.f. August 1, 2025. He will succeed Mr. Prashant Patil and lead the Operations function.The details as required to be disclosed under the SEBI Listing Regulations, read with SEBI Master Circular dated November 11, 2024, have been provided in Annexure A to this letter. Kindly take the above information on record.
